heading: Create API (Application Programming Interface) Keys for an Organization
body:
- Enter a Description.

- In the Organization Permissions menu, select the
  [organization role](organization-roles) for the
  API (Application Programming Interface) key.

The public key acts as the username when making API requests.

The private key acts as the password when making API requests.

> **Warning:** 
>
> Copy and save Public and Private Keys
>
> The Private Key is only shown once: *on this page*.
> Click the Copy button to add the Private Key to the
> clipboard. Save and secure both the Public and Private Keys.

- Click Add Access list Entry.

- Enter an IP (Internet Protocol) address or CIDR (Classless Inter-Domain Routing) block from which you want Atlas
  to accept API (Application Programming Interface) requests for this API (Application Programming Interface) Key.

  You can also click Use Current IP Address if the host
  you are using to access Atlas will also make API (Application Programming Interface) requests
  using this API (Application Programming Interface) Key.

- Click Save.
